_comment: Tag ruleset for release tags `v*`. Bypass is the repo admin role only — release-please.yml uses RELEASE_PLEASE_TOKEN (a maintainer-owned PAT), so tag creation runs *as the maintainer* (admin), not as github-actions[bot]. The Integration bypass for App ID 15368 was rejected at import time anyway: GitHub only honours bypass-actor entries of type Integration on org-level rulesets, not repo-level. Imported via `gh api repos/amiwrpremium/go-derive/rulesets --method POST --input .github/rulesets/tags-v.json`.
name: release-tag-protection

bypass_actors._comment: Repo admin role — GitHub's built-in admin role ID is 5. Covers maintainer-driven tag creation via release-please (PAT-authenticated as the admin) and emergency tag operations.
